# Workspace-specific Copilot Instructions

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements: Python CI/CD demo project with GitHub Actions and self-hosted runner for macOS M1.
- [x] Scaffold the Project: Project structure created with src, tests, .github/workflows, requirements.txt, README.md, .gitignore.
- [ ] Customize the Project: Will add code, tests, workflow next.
- [ ] Install Required Extensions: No extensions needed.
- [ ] Compile the Project: Will install dependencies and run tests.
- [ ] Create and Run Task: Will add tasks.json if needed.
- [ ] Launch the Project: Will prompt for debug mode if required.
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete: Will update README.md and copilot-instructions.md.
